diagrams.title: PUE Visualization - Data Center Energy Distribution
diagrams.description: Shows how total facility energy is divided between IT equipment and overhead (cooling, lighting, etc.)
diagrams.purpose: Understand PUE calculation and what constitutes efficient data centers

diagrams.title: GHG Protocol Three Scopes
diagrams.description: Concentric circles showing the three emission scopes from innermost (direct control) to outermost (value chain)
elements: Scope 1: Direct emissions - company vehicles, generators
Scope 2: Purchased electricity - data centers, offices
Scope 3: Value chain - travel, supply chain, disposal
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the categorization and expansion of emission scopes

diagrams.title: Life Cycle Assessment Stages
diagrams.description: Linear flowchart showing the 4 stages of LCA from raw materials to disposal
elements: Raw Material Extraction → Manufacturing → Distribution → Use → Disposal/Recycling
Arrows showing forward and potential recycling loops
diagrams.purpose: Understand the comprehensive nature of environmental impact evaluation

diagrams.title: Green IT Metrics Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparison table/infographic of various Green IT metrics with their formulas and ideal values
elements: Energy Proportionality (closer to linear is better)
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for all key Green IT metrics
